title: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Dog Treats With Chicken, Bumper Box 12 Bags
features: TREAT & REWARD: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, exciting, mini bone shaped treats, nutritious and full of flavour, ideal way to treat your dog as part of a balanced diet. Perfect for training and rewarding your pet.
TASTY DOG TREAT: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, deliciously tasty, healthy treat. Extra meaty, the perfect reward

NUTRITIOUS & FULL OF FLAVOUR: Munch & Crunch Extra Meaty Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, feed as a treat or reward anytime, as part of a well balanced diet. Not suitable for puppies under 4 months old. Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available
STORAGE: Before and after opening keep in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened always re-seal ready for next use.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, each bag 200g. Supplied as bumper sized box of 12 bags.
description: Product Description Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, deliciously tasty, healthy treat. Extra meaty, the perfect reward. Munch & Crunch Extra Meaty Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, feed as a treat or reward anytime, as part of a well balanced diet. Not suitable for puppies under 4 months old. Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. Before and after opening keep in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened always re-seal ready for next use. Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, each bag 200g. Supplied as bumper sized box of 12 bags. Indications All life stages (Adult as treat) Ingredients Cereals, Meat and Animal Derivatives (15% chicken, 8% beef), Oils and Fats. Directions Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. Please adjust the main meal accordingly. See more
